Prompt
U
Oracle Events
1. Search emails using search_emails (query: "Heartland" or "HM-2026-Q1-0042" or "invoice dispute"). Find: (a) Chloe Vance's review to Marcus identifying 3 invalid Heartland Q1 line items ($4,800: Marchetti cancelled, Osei cancelled, Venkatesh handled by Swift); (b) Marcus Thorne's formal dispute to Jake Loomis requesting corrected invoice for $8,000 (5 legitimate moves); (c) Chloe's forwarded cancellation evidence for Marchetti (Feb 10) and Osei (Feb 13); (d) Jake Loomis formal notice tying 20% Q3 rate increase to unresolved dispute.
2. Search emails using search_emails (query: "Swift" or "Greg Pallone" or "pricing" or "DOT surcharge"). Find Greg Pallone's email (subject contains "Pricing Update Effective Immediately" and "DOT Documentation Surcharge"): 15% base rate on new bookings, $500 DOT documentation surcharge per shipment effective April 11, applied to in-progress shipments Raj Patel (Dallas to Denver), Emilia Cruz (Phoenix to Portland), Jordan Ekwueme (Cleveland to Columbus), Nora Bennett (Indianapolis to Louisville).
3. Search Slack using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Heartland" or "expanded review" or "billing discrepancies") or conversations_history (channel_id: C005). Find Hana Kim's expanded review (ts: 1776269700.000000, thread_ts: 1774484176.000000, channel C005): 3 of 5 Q1 Heartland moves have discrepancies: (1) Marchetti/Osei/Venkatesh dispute $4,800 under VRECON-2026-Q1-HM; (2) Kevin Tran $650 storage not tied to addendum/ops note; (3) Priya Nair shuttle fee on vendor backup vs origin access notes; broader control issue than original invoice.
4. Search Slack in C006 or C005 using conversations_search_messages or conversations_history. Find March 25 vendor billing thread: Marcus confirms payment hold on HM-2026-Q1-0042 in QuickBooks, Lines 6-8 disputed, formal dispute going to Jake Loomis.
5. Retrieve Heartland Q1 bills using quickbooks_search_bills or quickbooks_get_bill. Find bill_heartland_q1_2026 (DocNumber HM-2026-Q1-0042) $12,800 (8 x $1,600); bill_heartland_q1_2026_hold (HM-2026-Q1-0042-HOLD) same total with Lines 6-8 DISPUTED (Marchetti Feb 10, Osei Feb 13, Venkatesh Swift). Cross-check to Airtable and cancellation emails.
6. Cross-reference Airtable using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations, field_name: Name, value: "Lily Marchetti" or similar) or airtable_list_records. Find rec_reloc_marchetti (Cancelled, RELOC-2026-009); rec_reloc_osei (Cancelled, RELOC-2026-010); rec_reloc_venkatesh (Completed, Swift not Heartland, RELOC-2026-015); rec_reloc_tran (Completed, Heartland, RELOC-2026-005). Heartland billed 8 moves; data shows 5 legitimate, 2 cancelled, 1 Swift.
7. Search cancellation emails using search_emails (query: "cancellation" or "Marchetti" or "Osei"). Find Chloe to jake.loomis@heartlandmovers.com: Marchetti RELOC-2026-009 Feb 10, 2026; Osei RELOC-2026-010 Feb 13, 2026; no vendor acknowledgment.
8. Search Swift bills using quickbooks_search_bills (criteria: Swift / vendor_swift). Find bill_swift_tran $2,885 (Portland to Denver); bill_swift_venkatesh $4,450; bill_swift_kovac $3,675; total open $11,010. Greg's $500 surcharge hits four in-progress shipments named in his email, not these three bills; 15% applies to new bookings forward.
9. List and open Linear issues using linear_list_issues (query: "Heartland" or "HM-2026-Q1-0042" or team filters) then linear_get_issue (id: ...). Find issue_heartland_q1_recon (#342, team_relocations, Chloe Vance, In Progress) "Vendor invoice reconciliation — Heartland Movers Q1 2026 (HM-2026-Q1-0042)"; linear_issue_6f33a369d77e (#118, team_operations, Marcus Thorne) "Consolidate Heartland Q1 billing discrepancies into vendor dispute response". Confirm by issue id and title, not display number alone.
10. Find vendor margin dataset ticket using linear_list_issues (query: "vendor margin" or "Q3" or "Airtable, QuickBooks, and CRM", team: team_operations) then linear_get_issue (id: linear_issue_c8cd5f52b170). Title "Build consolidated Q3 vendor margin dataset across Airtable, QuickBooks, and CRM", assignee Alejandro Fuentes. Do not confuse with unrelated issue that shares display number 214 in another team; use id linear_issue_c8cd5f52b170.
11. Retrieve bill_heartland_abdi via quickbooks_get_bill (DocNumber HM-2026-0418): $2,150 ($1,850 + $175 + $125). Compare to $1,600 flat line on consolidated Q1 invoice for context.
12. Align QuickBooks to reconciled verified Heartland moves: use quickbooks_create_bill (VendorRef: vendor_heartland_movers, DocNumber: HM-2026-Q1-VERIFIED, TotalAmt/Balance: 8000, Line: five lines at 1600 each for Dr. Yusuf Abdi, Kevin Tran, Ines Kovac, Marcus Webb, Tanya Reeves). Leave bill_heartland_q1_2026_hold disputed until vendor corrects; do not clear hold without finance approval. For $650 Tran storage and Priya Nair shuttle: document in Linear and email/Slack; book extra AP only if finance requires accrual for contested amounts.
13. Update Airtable using airtable_update_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_id: tblRelocations01, records: rec_reloc_tran) adding note on $650 unauthorized storage. No rec_reloc_nair for shuttle finding; document shuttle variance on linear_issue_6f33a369d77e and in Slack/email unless airtable_create_record is justified by policy.
14. Post update using linear_create_comment (issueId: linear_issue_6f33a369d77e, body: expanded totals) summarizing $4,800 invalid lines plus $650 storage plus Priya Nair shuttle still TBD, total disputed exposure above original $4,800. Optionally linear_update_issue on same id if team prefers.
15. Post using linear_create_comment (issueId: linear_issue_c8cd5f52b170, body: data-gap flags) on vendor margin dataset ticket: Heartland review shows messy vendor billing, 3 of 5 Q1 moves with issues, margin forecasts unreliable without reconciliation.
16. Post to #finance using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C005, payload: markdown) with full reconciliation: Heartland disputed/confirmed figures, Swift $11,010 open plus 15% new bookings and $500 surcharge on four named shipments, summary for Marcus and Alejandro.
17. Look up Marcus Thorne using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Marcus Thorne"). Look up Hana Kim using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Hana Kim"). Confirm marcus.thorne@moveops.com and hana.kim@moveops.com.
18. Send email using send_email (sender: hana.kim@moveops.com, recipients: marcus.thorne@moveops.com, cc: hana.kim@moveops.com, subject/content: Heartland and Swift reconciliation, line-by-line disputed vs confirmed, enough for Marcus's memo to Elena).
19. Search emails using search_emails (query: "rate increase" or "Jake Loomis" or "Q3" or "Formal Notice"). Find Jake Loomis email subject "Formal Notice: Q3 2026 Rate Adjustment and Account Review": 20% effective July 1, 2026, HM-2026-Q1-0042 dispute tied to deprioritization risk.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
